assertions.description: INCORRECT: The connectivity section reports routing_complete=True and unrouted=0, but routed_nets=32 while total_nets_with_pads=46. The 14-net gap corresponds exactly to pads with 'unconnected-(U2-PadN)' net names — these are intentional no-connect pads on the STM32F401CBUx (unused GPIO pins). These nets have pads but no tracks because they are deliberately unconnected. The displayed 'routed_nets' metric could be confusing to users who see 32 vs 46 alongside routing_complete=True. Adding a 'no_connect_net_count' field or noting this distinction would improve clarity.
